hero.title: Your supplements,
hero.description: 5-minute health assessment → personalized supplement plan with doses, timing, drug interaction checks, and evidence ratings.
hero.descriptionShort: Complete a 5-minute assessment and receive a personalized supplement protocol with evidence ratings.

blog.title: The Science of Healthy Living
blog.description: Expert-written articles on evidence-based nutrition to help you live healthier.

how.title: How NutriGenius works
how.description: A systematic, evidence-based approach to supplement recommendations — not guesswork.
how.s1Desc: Answer questions about your health, medications, lifestyle, and goals. Add lab results or genetic data for even better results.
how.s2Desc: Our algorithm searches a curated knowledge base of supplement-condition mappings, each rated by evidence strength.
how.s3Desc: Every recommendation is cross-checked against your medications for interactions. Unsafe combinations are automatically blocked.
how.s4Desc: Receive a personalized plan with 5-8 supplements, optimal doses, timing schedule, and clear explanations for each one.

features.title: What makes us different
features.description: Most supplement recommendations are marketing-driven. Ours are clinically-driven.
features.f1Desc: Not a chatbot making guesses. A structured rules engine with a curated clinical knowledge base drives every recommendation.
features.f2Desc: Every supplement is screened against your medications. Critical interactions are blocked. Moderate ones are flagged with clear warnings.
features.f3Desc: Each recommendation shows its evidence level — Strong, Moderate, Emerging, or Traditional — so you know exactly what the science says.
features.f4Desc: Upload your blood work results and get recommendations calibrated to your actual biomarker levels, not generic doses.
features.f5Desc: See exactly what to take and when — morning, midday, evening — with timing optimized for absorption and your daily routine.
features.f6Desc: Have genetic data? MTHFR, COMT, VDR, and other variants are used to select the right supplement forms for your biology.

safety.title: Your safety is non-negotiable
safety.description: NutriGenius was designed by a Clinical Pharmacology Expert with pharmaceutical clinical development experience. Every recommendation passes through multiple safety layers before it reaches you.
safety.p1: Supplements with critical drug interactions are automatically blocked
safety.p2: Doses never exceed established Upper Tolerable Intake Levels
safety.p3: Pregnancy and breastfeeding restrictions are strictly enforced
safety.p4: All recommendations include evidence ratings and source transparency
safety.p5: This platform supplements — never replaces — professional medical advice

cta.title: Ready to optimize your supplement routine?
cta.description: Join 10,000+ users who have replaced guesswork with evidence-based supplementation. It takes 5 minutes and it's completely free.
cta.subtext: No account required · 100% free · Takes 5 minutes

footer.medicalText: NutriGenius provides educational information based on published scientific evidence. It is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult your healthcare provider before starting any supplement regimen.
footer.affiliateText: We may earn commissions from purchases made through links on this platform. This does not affect the price you pay or our recommendations.
footer.aiText: Recommendations are generated by an AI system based on published scientific evidence and a structured clinical knowledge base.

quiz.disclaimer: Your data is processed securely and never shared with third parties. NutriGenius is not a substitute for professional medical advice.
quiz.desc1: Let's start with some basic information to personalize your recommendations.
quiz.desc2: Tell us about your health conditions and any medications you're taking. This is critical for safety screening.
quiz.desc3: Your lifestyle habits help us fine-tune supplement choices and timing.
quiz.desc4: Lab results allow us to identify actual deficiencies and calibrate doses. Skip this if you don't have recent results.
quiz.desc5: Genetic data helps us select the optimal supplement forms for your biology.
quiz.emailDesc: Your personalized supplement protocol is ready! Enter your email to receive it:
quiz.emailPdfOpt: Your complete supplement plan as a downloadable PDF
quiz.emailCalOpt: 3-month calendar reminders for your supplement schedule
quiz.emailNewsOpt: Biweekly health insights and supplement updates
quiz.emailPrivacy1: By entering your email, you agree to receive your plan and occasional health updates. Unsubscribe anytime.
quiz.emailPrivacy2: Your health data is processed securely under GDPR Article 9.
quiz.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.
quiz.demoHalalDesc: Only show Halal-certified or generally Halal supplement recommendations
quiz.healthSafetyDesc: Certain supplements can interact with medications — sometimes dangerously. We screen every recommendation against your medication list to keep you safe.
quiz.healthCondHint: Select all that apply. Click a category to expand.
quiz.healthMedHint: Start typing to search common medications
quiz.healthSuppHint: Type a supplement name and press Enter
quiz.goalsHint: Select up to 5 goals that matter most to you
quiz.labsWhyTitle: Why lab results improve your recommendations
quiz.labsWhyDesc: Actual biomarker levels let us identify real deficiencies and calibrate doses precisely — rather than relying on averages. Results within the last 12 months work best.
quiz.labsOldResult: This result is over 12 months old — consider retesting
quiz.labsNoResultsHint: Select a biomarker above to get started, or skip this step
quiz.labsSkipNote: Don't have lab results? No problem — you can skip this step and still get quality recommendations. You can always add results later.
quiz.genQuestion: Do you have genetic testing results?
quiz.genEntryHint: Enter your results for any variants you have data on. Leave blank if you don't have a specific result.
quiz.genCtaTitle: Genetic data can significantly improve your recommendations
quiz.genCtaDesc: Understanding your genetic variants helps us select the exact right supplement forms for your biology — especially for folate metabolism (MTHFR), vitamin D absorption (VDR), and cardiovascular health (APOE). A simple at-home test can provide these insights.
quiz.genCtaPrice: Partner labs offer affordable testing starting from €99

results.planSentTo: Your plan has been sent to {email}.
results.heroSubtitle: Evidence-based recommendations tailored to your health profile
results.protocolSubtitle: Ranked by priority — lab-confirmed deficiencies first, then evidence strength.
results.noSupplements: No specific supplements identified for your profile.
results.noSupplementsHint: Try adding health conditions or goals in the quiz.
results.safetyFilteredSubtitle: These supplements were excluded due to potential interactions or contraindications.
results.scheduleSubtitle: Optimal timing based on absorption science and supplement interactions.
results.updateTitle: Keep your plan up to date
results.updateDesc: Want to update your plan? Retake the assessment in 3 months for updated recommendations based on your progress and any changes in your health.
results.disclaimerText: These recommendations are for informational purposes only and do not constitute medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional before starting any supplement regimen, especially if you have existing health conditions or take prescription medications. Supplement requirements vary by individual and should be assessed by a qualified clinician.
results.loadError: Could not load your recommendations. Please retake the quiz.

cookies.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze site traffic. We respect your privacy.
cookies.necessaryDesc: Required for the site to function. Cannot be disabled.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Helps us understand how visitors interact with the site.
cookies.advertisingDesc: Used to display Google AdSense ads and support Amazon affiliate partnerships.
cookies.functionalDesc: Saves your preferences and quiz progress.
